description.ko: 단일 백색광이 삼각형 유리 매질을 통해 찬란한 무지개 빛깔로 변하는 빛의 굴절을 예술적으로 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: An artistic visualization of light refraction where a single beam of white light is transformed into a vibrant spectrum through a triangular glass medium.

prompt: A high-quality 8k resolution 3D render of a geometric glass prism centered on a dark, minimalist surface. A sharp beam of intense white light enters the prism from the left, undergoing refraction to emerge as a vivid, spreading rainbow spectrum on the right side. Soft caustic light patterns on the ground, cinematic depth of field, sharp focus on the glass edges, scientific and elegant aesthetic.
